description: L7 notification-sound toggle (coverage-widening, hermetic): drive l3_set_setting notificationSound and prove it round-trips through l3_dump_state.notificationSound (true->false->true). notificationSound is an account-scoped Prefs bool (the settings 'notification sound' switch) read by the badge/notification path. Uses EXACT-value polling (state_equals) so the mid-state is checked precisely (codex P2). Soft precondition (starts true, the seeded default) catches a dirty fixture; ends restored to true so the fixture self-cleans even if interrupted. Hermetic — no echo peer. Maps to feature L7 (notification-sound half; the auto-accept half is S46/S47).
